patient_001.title: Chest tightness on exertion
patient_001.detail: Reported during a brisk walk; resolved with rest.

patient_001.title: Cardiology consult
patient_001.detail: ECG normal. Started on a beta-blocker for suspected exertional angina.

patient_001.title: Metoprolol 25mg started
patient_001.detail: Beta-blocker. Metabolized in part via CYP2D6.

patient_001.title: Metoprolol increased to 50mg
patient_001.detail: Dosage increase after follow-up.

patient_001.title: New persistent fatigue
patient_001.detail: Began ~3 days after the dosage increase.

patient_001.title: Late-night dinners become routine
patient_001.detail: Work stress; dinner regularly after 10pm.

patient_001.title: Poor sleep (avg 5.2h, low REM)
patient_001.detail: Wearable shows fragmented sleep, REM < 45 min on bad nights.

patient_001.title: Morning glucose spikes
patient_001.detail: CGM: fasting spikes to 140-160 on mornings after poor sleep.

patient_001.title: Unexplained skin rash
patient_001.detail: Malar-pattern rash across cheeks; attributed to sun.

patient_001.title: Sunday-evening anxiety pattern
patient_001.detail: Recurring dread before Monday; tied to performance reviews.

patient_001.title: Weight gain +6kg over 9 months
patient_001.detail: Despite no diet change.

patient_001.title: Intermittent joint pain
patient_001.detail: Wrists and knuckles, worse in the morning.

patient_001.title: Elevated ANA titer 1:320
patient_001.detail: Ordered for fatigue workup; flagged but not followed up.

patient_001.title: Therapy: work rumination + insomnia
patient_001.detail: CBT homework started. Anxiety clusters before quarterly reviews.

patient_001.title: HbA1c 6.1% (prediabetic)
patient_001.detail: Crossed into prediabetic range.

patient_001.title: Sudden kidney inflammation
patient_001.detail: Presented with edema + proteinuria. Trigger for full workup.

patient_001.title: Clarithromycin started (infection)
patient_001.detail: Strong CYP3A4 inhibitor.

patient_001.title: On atorvastatin (prior)
patient_001.detail: Statin; cleared via CYP3A4.

patient_001.title: Reduced kidney function (eGFR 58)
patient_001.detail: Lowers clearance of accumulating drugs.

patient_001.title: Curie flag: early-onset lupus pattern
patient_001.detail: Rash + joint pain + ANA + nephritis cluster.

patient_002.title: Cognitive check 2025-12
patient_002.detail: Vocabulary richness 100, memory recall 100, language complexity 100.

patient_002.title: Cognitive check 2026-01
patient_002.detail: Vocabulary richness 98, memory recall 96, language complexity 99.

patient_002.title: Cognitive check 2026-02
patient_002.detail: Vocabulary richness 95, memory recall 92, language complexity 96.

patient_002.title: Cognitive check 2026-03
patient_002.detail: Vocabulary richness 90, memory recall 86, language complexity 92.

patient_002.title: Cognitive check 2026-04
patient_002.detail: Vocabulary richness 84, memory recall 79, language complexity 88.

patient_002.title: Cognitive check 2026-05
patient_002.detail: Vocabulary richness 78, memory recall 71, language complexity 83.

patient_002.title: Cognitive check 2026-06
patient_002.detail: Vocabulary richness 71, memory recall 64, language complexity 79.

patient_003.title: Routine labs
patient_003.detail: Mostly within range; one borderline marker.

patient_003.title: Lifestyle log
patient_003.detail: Sleep and activity tracked via wearable.
